meaning: n.(<<尼伯龙之歌>>中的勃艮第王)巩特尔
examples: The claim was made by German doctor Gunther von Hagens.
Gunther realizes Joey's not working at the coffee house any more.
Gunther IV has bought a Miami villa from Madonna and won a rare white truffle in an auction.
The head of the German European Affairs Committee Gunther Krichbaum said the "EU was not a multiple choice event".
Germany is said to be thinking of nominating Gunther Verheugen, a deputy foreign minister, as one of its two commissioners.
